name: Hunan Style Salmon Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Salmon filet, boned and skin removed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, oyster sauce, chili paste, tomato paste, clam juice, 2 teaspoons of the cornstarch, sugar, and lemon juice. Set aside.
2. Toss the salmon in the remaining cornstarch mixed with chili powder.
3. Heat a large wok until smoking. Add the peanut oil and gently stir fry the salmon in 2 batches until its surface is lightly browned and crisp, about 2 minutes. Remove the salmon with a slotted spoon to a strainer or colander to drain. Pour off all but a thin film of the oil.
4. Add the scallions, garlic, and ginger root and stir fry for 10 seconds.
5. Return the salmon to the wok, add the reserved liquid, and simmer until lightly thickened.
6. Toss in the pumpkin seeds. Serve over rice. Makes 4 servings.
